pulse: The Financials sector is currently trading at a median EV/EBITDA of 7.9x and a P/E of 14.9x, slightly below broader market averages which indicate a more cautious investor sentiment. Notably, Goldman Sachs (GS) has demonstrated a strong revenue growth of 15.2%, as highlighted in the Global Banking Annual Review 2025, which emphasizes that precision rather than size will dictate future success in banking, suggesting GS may leverage its operational efficiencies to outperform. Looking forward, investors should consider positioning in firms like GS and Morgan Stanley (MS), which are well-aligned with the evolving market dynamics as discussed in recent earnings previews, indicating potential continued momentum amidst rising earnings expectations.
